Employment Agreement 2024: This Employment Agreement is entered into between Horizon Technologies Inc ("Employer") and Jordan Lee ("Employee"), effective January 15, 2024. Employee is hired as Senior Software Engineer with a base annual salary of $165,000, paid biweekly, plus eligibility for an annual performance bonus of up to 15% of base salary. Employee agrees to comply with all company policies, including the Acceptable Use Policy and Confidentiality Agreement attached hereto. Either party may terminate this Agreement with 30 days' written notice; the Company may terminate for cause without notice.
